text:
Also, how I'm tracking this is I have a custom skill that I wrote for Cursor/Codex that also is a hook, that will track metrics over time - for each task I do - it submits it for four critical metrics:

1. Code quality.
2. Bugs and defects.
3. Security related issues.
4.
raw_text:
Also, how I'm tracking this is I have a custom skill that I wrote for Cursor/Codex that also is a hook, that will track metrics over time - for each task I do - it submits it for four critical metrics:

1. Code quality.
2. Bugs and defects.
3. Security related issues.
4.

classification.reason: User describes building a custom tracking skill for Cursor/Codex to monitor coding metrics
